title: Plan & design review: planning-bracket
description:
Planning node (P) for the plan-before-fan-out bracket epic. Produces and gets review on the design before any breakdown. Plan artifact: dev/active/planning-bracket-design.md.

When this is approved, break the epic down into the 12 tasks (5 waves) described in the design doc; that breakdown is the fan-out (B) and must not happen before this plan is accepted.

## Success Criteria
- [hard] Design doc reviewed and the 25+ design decisions confirmed sound and coherent.
- [hard] Task breakdown (12 tasks, dependency waves) validated against the design before fan-out.
